title: Braceman
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Update|[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|Darth Plagueis]]}}
[[File:Rodick_Tag.png|thumb|right|250px|A braceman]]
'''Braceman''' was a title bestowed on veteran members of the [[Iotran Police Force]]. These individuals dedicated their lives to [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunting]].
